browser-specs.name: Browser-specs
browser-specs.description:
This project exports a curated list of technical Web specifications. The list is used in a variety of ways, including:

To crawl specifications with Reffy to generate machine-readable extracts in Webref, which is then used by tools such as ReSpec and Bikeshed to create terminology and reference links between Web specifications.
To validate specification URLs in the browser-compat-data (BCD) and web-features projects.
To complete the list of specifications in the Specref database.
To create reports on test coverage, Web IDL and specification quality in analyzing tools.
browser-specs.description_html:
This project exports a curated list of technical Web specifications. The list is used in a variety of ways, including:

  • To crawl specifications with Reffy to generate machine-readable extracts in Webref, which is then used by tools such as ReSpec and Bikeshed to create terminology and reference links between Web specifications.
  • To validate specification URLs in the browser-compat-data (BCD) and web-features projects.
  • To complete the list of specifications in the Specref database.
  • To create reports on test coverage, Web IDL and specification quality in analyzing tools.
